question: How do late submissions work?
final_answer: According to our late work policy, submissions between 25-48 hours late incur a 25% deduction from the earned score. For example, if you earn 90/100 but submitted 30 hours late, you would receive 90 × 0.75 = 67.5 points. This deduction applies after grading, so your instructor will first calculate your grade as usual and then apply the penalty.
